description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 mins of coding time in WakaTime, with activity split mostly across Other and a small amount of Java. The data shows work spread across 2 projects, but no public GitHub commits, repos, or pull requests this week.
